name: Assets Management Technician Onboarding
description: Assets management onboarding process for new technicians

steps.title: Setup Asset Assignments
steps.description: Prepare and assign necessary company assets to new technician

substeps.title: Determine asset requirements
substeps.description: Assess what assets the technician needs based on role and territory

substeps.title: Check asset availability
substeps.description: Verify required assets are available for assignment

substeps.title: Assign assets to technician
substeps.description: Formally assign assets and update asset management system

substeps.title: Document asset assignments
substeps.description: Create documentation of all assigned assets

steps.title: Compliance and Documentation Setup
steps.description: Ensure all compliance requirements are met

substeps.title: Asset responsibility agreement
substeps.description: Have technician sign asset responsibility agreement

substeps.title: Setup asset tracking
substeps.description: Configure asset tracking systems for technician

steps.title: Asset Training and Handover
steps.description: Provide training on asset care and usage

substeps.title: Provide asset care training
substeps.description: Train technician on proper asset care and maintenance
